channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Georgia islanders rushed to rescue survivors after dock walkway collapse that killed 7
item.description: SAVANNAH, Ga. (AP) — Orange life jackets bobbed in the water, where bystanders rushed to form a human chain for passing survivors to safety. Others shouldered the task of wrapping dead bodies in blankets and carrying them to shore.
item.dc:creator: RUSS BYNUM and EMILY WAGSTER PETTUS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Russell Wilson throws for 2 TDs, runs for another TD in Pittsburgh debut as Steelers rout Jets 37-15
item.description: Russell Wilson threw two touchdown passes and ran for another score in his Pittsburgh debut to lead the Steelers to a 37-15 win over Aaron Rodgers and the New York Jets on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Oscar brings winds, heavy rains to eastern Cuba after striking the Bahamas
item.description: HAVANA (AP) — Tropical Storm Oscar brought heavy rains and winds to Cuba, an island already beleaguered by a massive power outage, late Sunday after brushing the Bahamas.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: What to know about credit card APR
item.description: From good vs. bad rates to avoiding common pitfalls, credit card APR can significantly impact your financial health.
item.dc:creator: Damita Menezes, NewsNation

item.title: 2 Navy aviators are declared dead after a fighter jet crashed in Washington state
item.description: Two crew members who were missing following the crash of a fighter jet in mountainous terrain in Washington state during a routine training flight have been declared dead, the U.S. Navy said Sunday.
item.dc:creator: MARTHA BELLISLE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Thelma Mothershed Wair, a member of the Little Rock Nine who integrated an Arkansas school, has died
item.description: One of the nine Black students who integrated a high school in Arkansas’ capital city in 1957 while a mob of white segregationists yelled threats and insults at them has died at age 83.
item.dc:creator: Emily Wagster Pettus, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: New Zealand wins cricket's Women’s T20 World Cup for 1st time with 32-run victory over South Africa
item.description: New Zealand won the Women’s T20 World Cup for the first time, beating South Africa by 32 runs on Sunday after a standout performance from Amelia Kerr with bat and ball.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Suspect escapes Miami hospital after complaining of chest pains, flees in Maserati: police
item.description: Theodric Collins, 36, was evaluated at Jackson Memorial Hospital in Miami before making his escape in a waiting Maserati while still handcuffed, police said.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Singer among victims in couple's alleged Las Vegas theft spree during Super Bowl week
item.description: A married couple allegedly stole hundreds of thousands of dollars worth of valuables as Las Vegas hosted the Super Bowl, with one theft involving singer Jason Derulo.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, KRON4

item.title: Learning about God from dogs, Orthodox monks breed and train canines in upstate New York monastery
item.description: CAMBRIDGE, New York (AP) — After he and his fellow monks sang morning prayers in their church nestled in a forest, Brother Luke walked back to his residence to be greeted by a different kind of choir.
item.dc:creator: GIOVANNA DELL'ORTO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Man charged in NYC subway chokehold death set to stand trial
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — To some New Yorkers, he’s the white vigilante who choked an innocent Black man to death on the subway. To others, he’s the U.S. Marine Corps veteran whose attempt to subdue a mentally ill man ended in tragedy.
item.dc:creator: PHILIP MARCELO, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: From showgirl feathers to shimmering chandeliers, casino kitsch finds new life
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Crystal chandeliers that once glimmered above a swanky lounge, bright blue costume feathers that cloaked shimmying showgirls, and fake palm trees that evoked a desert oasis are just some the artifacts making their way from the latest latest casino graveyards of Las Vegas into Sin Ci
item.dc:creator: RIO YAMAT, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Child labor violations on the rise, problem could get worse: report
item.description: Between 2011 and 2020, the rate of injuries among workers under 18 nearly doubled, a recent report says.
item.dc:creator: Cassie Buchman, ABC 4

item.title: Haddonfield, Illinois: How the iconic small town of horror in the 'Halloween' franchise came to be
item.description: Haddonfield, Illinois, a fictional small town, is the setting for John Carpenter's iconic horror film "Halloween," which has become a cultural phenomenon and has inspired numerous sequels and remakes.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, ABC 4

item.title: Massachusetts parents sue school district over student receiving 'D' after using AI for social studies project
item.description: A Massachusetts couple has filed a lawsuit against their son's school district after he used artificial intelligence for a class project, and was accused of plagiarism.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Singer Zayn postpones US tour after the death of his former bandmate Liam Payne
item.description: English singer Zayn Malik on Saturday postponed a planned tour to the U.S. following the death of his former One Direction bandmate Liam Payne.
item.dc:creator: NICK PERRY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: NYC officials envision turning Fifth Avenue into a grand boulevard
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Manhattan’s famed luxury store row Fifth Avenue is in line for a major makeover. New York City officials unveiled a plan this week to transform a central portion of the thoroughfare between Bryant Park and Central Park into a more pedestrian-centered boulevard.
item.dc:creator: PHILIP MARCELO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Where is the 'best restroom' in the U.S.? In a Utah gas station
item.description: The runners-up of this year's contest included a disco party bathroom, a bathroom full of mirrors and neon lights, and a very reflective 80s-inspired restroom in a brunch restaurant, among others.
item.dc:creator: Trevor Myers, KRON4

item.title: Two Texas cities represent the divide between those who vote and those who could, but often don't
item.description: LEWISVILLE, Texas (AP) — Deep in the heart of Texas' sprawl, the city of Lewisville embodies the Lone Star State.
item.dc:creator: NICHOLAS RICCARDI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: No. 2 Oregon routs Purdue 35-0, remains on top of Big Ten with first road shutout in over 30 years
item.description: WEST LAFAYETTE, Ind. (AP) — Oregon coach Dan Lanning challenged his team to see how it would respond to a long road trip on a short week following its 32-31 victory over then-No. 2 Ohio State last week. The No. 2 Ducks aced that test Friday night.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Buy a tiny house at Walmart? You can for under $16K
item.description: While there are dozens of things to consider before purchasing a tiny home, it's never been easier to find and buy one.
item.dc:creator: Russell Falcon, Fox 5

item.title: Kentucky family demands answers after organs nearly taken from living man
item.description: A Kentucky family is looking for answers after a man was declared brain dead and being prepared to have his organs harvested while he was still alive.
item.dc:creator: Kiley Hill, WGN 9

item.title: Grandma who texted stranger for Thanksgiving announces breast cancer diagnosis
item.description: The Arizona grandmother who sent a text message to what she believed was her grandson’s phone number, inviting him over for Thanksgiving dinner nearly nine years ago, has announced her diagnosis of breast cancer.
item.dc:creator: Celeste Houmard, KTLA 5

item.title: Guardians starting Tanner Bibee in Game 5 against Yankees after short outing earlier in ALCS
item.description: Tanner Bibee is getting a second crack at the Yankees in the AL Championship Series. His first one didn't go so well. The right-hander will start for the Cleveland Guardians in Game 5 on Saturday after he was pulled from Game 2 in the second inning by manager Stephen Vogt.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Video and an unused bullet prove man's guilt in Indiana girls' killings, prosecutor says
item.description: DELPHI, Ind. (AP) — A man charged with killing two teenage girls in a small Indiana community forced them off a hiking trail before cutting their throats, a prosecutor said Friday, telling jurors that the evidence includes an unused bullet and video recorded on the eldest girl’s phone.
item.dc:creator: RICK CALLAHAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Cheryl Cole asks to give Liam Payne a 'little dignity' after his death
item.description: Cheryl Cole, the ex-partner of Liam Payne and the mother of his son Bear, has broken her silence on the singer's death.
item.dc:creator: Christine Samra, KTLA 5

item.title: It's more dangerous to drive at night in these states than anywhere else in the US
item.description: Driving at night is dangerous no matter where you are in the U.S. It's harder to see and you're more likely to be sharing the road with fellow drivers who are either tired and could potentially doze off or have had one too many drinks and are driving under the influence.
item.dc:creator: Nick Jachim, WGN 9

item.title: Former MTV VJ Ananda Lewis reveals stage 4 breast cancer diagnosis
item.description: The TV personality first revealed she was diagnosed with breast cancer years ago, but it has progressed and metastasized since.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, Fox 5

item.title: Walter White of 'Breaking Bad' returns for New Mexico litter campaign
item.description: Two television ads featuring Bryan Cranston as Walter White, directed by "Breaking Bad" creator Vince Gilligan, were created to promote clean-up of New Mexico areas.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Salinas, ABC 4

item.title: Whooping cough is at a decade-high level in US
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Whooping cough is at its highest level in a decade for this time of year, U.S. health officials reported Thursday. There have been 18,506 cases of whooping cough reported so far, the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention said.
item.dc:creator: DEVI SHASTRI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Mitzi Gaynor, star of ‘South Pacific,’ dies at 93
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Mitzi Gaynor, the effervescent dancer and actor who starred as Nellie Forbush in the 1958 film "South Pacific" and appeared in other musicals with Bing Crosby, Frank Sinatra and Gene Kelly, has died. She was 93.
item.dc:creator: KAITLYN HUAMANI and BOB THOMAS, Associated Press, ABC 4
